steps.title: Recognize the linear relationship structure
steps.content:
The equation $0.3t + 3 = 5$ follows the form (coefficient × time) + (initial value) = (final value).
The constant 3 is Antwon's starting hair length in inches. The final length is 5 inches. The expression $0.3t$ represents how much the hair grows over $t$ months.

steps.title: Identify what the coefficient represents
steps.content:
When a coefficient multiplies a time variable in a linear growth equation, it represents the rate of change per unit time.
Here, $0.3$ multiplies $t$ (months), so $0.3$ is the amount of growth per month measured in inches. In other words, the hair grows $0.3$ inches each month. That matches choice B — B is correct.
